A 2,400-hectare forest fire is burning in Chernihiv Oblast near the Russian border, where emergency crews say Russian FPV drones are preventing full access to the area. Photo: Ukraine’s Northern Forest Office/Facebook.

title: Air defense active
description: 👀 In Ukraine, the Shahedov jet interceptor with a speed of up to 320 km/h was presented - Army Recognition At the SAHA 2026 exhibition, the Ukrainian Chaklun drone interceptor, which is already used against Russian UAVs, was shown. The drone is equipped with a turbojet engine, develops a speed of up to 320 km/h and can operate at an altitude of up to 6 km. Its range is up to 30 km when working together with RADA class radars....

title: Drone attack
description: The Ministry of Defense of the Russian Federation said that the drones that fell in Latvia were allegedly flying to attack St. Petersburg. They claim that there were allegedly six drones in Latvian airspace at night, as well as two French Rafales and two F-16s. According to Moscow, UAVs were supposed to attack objects in the St. Petersburg area. Minlapsha said that five drones "missed" in the Latvian Rezekne area, and one more allegedly...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Russian attacks on Ukrainian first responders rise, follow ‘sustained pattern,’ report finds. The report describes the trend as a “deeply troubling trajectory in the war,” finding a sustained pattern in which responders are repeatedly targeted while carrying out rescue operations, including after arriving at strike sites.
